title: Lichess User
description: Public profile data for a Lichess user. Extracted from the Lichess API LightUser, User, and UserExtended response shapes.

id.description: Lowercased canonical username used as the user identifier.

title.description: FIDE title or special title such as GM, IM, FM, BOT.

patron.description: True when the user is a current Lichess Patron donor.

online.description: True when the user is currently online.

playing.description: True when the user is currently in a game.

streaming.description: True when the user is streaming on a connected streaming platform.

tosViolation.description: True if the user has been marked for a terms of service violation.

createdAt.description: Account creation timestamp in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

seenAt.description: Most recent activity timestamp in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

language.description: User's preferred language as a BCP 47 tag.

url.description: Canonical URL to the user's Lichess profile.

perfs.description: Per-time-control performance statistics keyed by perf name (bullet, blitz, rapid, classical, correspondence, chess960, etc.).

prog.description: Recent rating progress over the last twelve games.

prov.description: True when the rating is still provisional.
